notes: Active post-release polish hub for cross-frontend CSS maintainability before docs freshness and design-system alignment review.
Do not use this hub to redesign public browser, installed PWA, or admin surfaces.
Runtime cleanup should stay low-friction while main carries active QA work: refresh inventory first, then make only source-grounded CSS ownership/token fixes.
Consume the protected PWA baseline census and implementation-scope updates from client-pwa-design-system-transition instead of duplicating that work.
Primary focus: CSS ownership, undefined custom properties, global selector scope, raw-value/token drift, flexible CSS patterns, and lightweight guardrails.
Public browser components stay client-local and component-authored; installed PWA and admin dialects remain separate.
Contracts lane is n/a; state_api owns only durable scripts/checks, not runtime data/API behavior.
client-pwa-gardener-audit prerequisite completed and archived; CSS maintainability polish is now active as post-release design-system cleanup.

state_api complete on main: scripts/design/check-css-custom-properties.{mjs,test.mjs}, scripts/data/css-custom-property-baseline.tsv (64 audited unresolved entries), and check-tokens.sh wiring. Broad CSS source cleanup and visual QA remain owned by the ui and qa lanes.
2026-05-10 direction: run CSS maintainability before docs freshness and before the broader design-system alignment review.

red.evidence: Guard reported 64 audited unresolved entries with 4 entries pointing at packages/admin/src/components/Hypercerts/DistributionChart.tsx (--color-info-base/dark) and packages/shared/src/components/Toast/toast.service.tsx (--color-primary-strong, --color-text-subtle-600).

green.evidence: CSS custom property guard passed: 2939 var() references, 993 definitions, 60 audited unresolved entries. Drop of 4 confirms source edits + baseline prune are coherent; stale-baseline detection in the script (line 274) would have failed if they drifted.

tdd.note: Mechanical alias renames against tokens already defined in packages/shared/src/styles/theme.css (lines 1386, 1424, 1453-1454). No behavior change, no new tokens. Both surfaced in handoff and need their owners to land.
